locations.name: 肯尼亚
locations.summary: 肯亞共和國（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Kenya；英語：Republic of Kenya），通稱肯亞（Kenya），是位於東非，濒临印度洋，與索馬里、埃塞俄比亚、南蘇丹、烏干達、坦桑尼亚接壤，面积约58万平方公里。肯亞人口约52…

relations.subject: Abyssinian ground thrush
relations.evidence: The Abyssinian ground thrush (Geokichla piaggiae) is a thrush from the family Turdidae which is native to north-east Africa where it lives at high altitude in montane forests. Its binomial nomenclature honors the 19th century Italian explorer of East Africa Carlo Piaggia.{{cite journal|title=Carlo Piaggia, the definition of "gallery forests", and forest avifauna in Central Africa|date=31 December 2023|volume=40|pages=157-170|author=Spartaco Gippoliti|author2=Luca Lupi |journal=Boll

relations.subject: Abyssinian ground thrush
relations.evidence: The Abyssinian ground thrush occurs in the undergrowth of evergreen montane forest in high rainfall regions between , mostly above , although occasionally found lower
